title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) to Donate One (1) Unit of Grasscutter and One (1) of Multi-tiller / Cultivator to Los Baños Association of Organic Fruit and Vegetable Growers with Office Address at Barangay Bagong Silang, Los Baños, Laguna Represented by Its President Mr. Joseph C. Villegas. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 10/20/2021)
